The Core Ecosystem

Smart Macros

High-Speed Go Engine

Compiled binary execution ensures your build pipeline stays lightning fast.

Multi-Theme Runtime

Auto-ARIA

ZINTENT understands the role of your components and injects accessibility tags for you.
